problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
mechanism: Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference
hypothesis: The key to Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? is Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference — specifically Optical neural network — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.
